nodes.name: agg.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input defining SQL queries for aggregate functions, testing logical and physical plan generation for COUNT, SUM, AVG, and streaming aggregation scenarios.

nodes.name: append_only.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input with SQL queries verifying append-only table plan generation and optimization.

nodes.name: array.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input covering array type expressions, array constructors, and array function calls in query plans.

nodes.name: array_access.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for array element access expressions, checking correct plan generation for subscript operator on arrays.

nodes.name: asof_join.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for ASOF (as-of) join queries, verifying temporal join plan generation for time-series data alignment.

nodes.name: atlasgo.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input with Atlas-schema-related SQL queries for testing compatibility with Atlas migration tool patterns.

nodes.name: backfill.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for materialized view backfill plans, validating plan generation for streaming backfill operators.

nodes.name: basic_query.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input covering fundamental SQL queries (SELECT, WHERE, ORDER BY, LIMIT) to validate baseline plan generation.

nodes.name: batch_dist_agg.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for distributed batch aggregation queries, testing two-phase aggregation plan generation.

nodes.name: batch_index_join.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for batch index join plans, verifying the optimizer's index selection and join strategy for batch queries.

nodes.name: batch_seq_scan.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for sequential scan plans in batch mode, validating full table scan plan generation.

nodes.name: batch_source.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for batch queries reading from external sources, testing source scan plan generation in batch mode.

nodes.name: bushy_join.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for bushy join tree plans, testing the optimizer's ability to generate non-linear join orderings.

nodes.name: case_when_optimization.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input with CASE/WHEN expressions, testing optimizer rewrites and simplifications for conditional expressions.

nodes.name: cast.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for CAST expressions, verifying type coercion and implicit cast insertion in query plans.

nodes.name: ch_benchmark.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input with CH (Confluent Hub) benchmark queries adapted for RisingWave, testing complex analytical query planning.

nodes.name: changelog.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for changelog (CDC-style) source queries, verifying change log plan generation.

nodes.name: column_pruning.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for column pruning optimization, validating that the optimizer eliminates unused column projections.

nodes.name: common_table_expressions.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for WITH (CTE) queries, testing common table expression inlining and sharing in query plans.

nodes.name: concat_op_dispatch.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for the `||` (concatenation/array concatenation) operator dispatch, validating type-based overload resolution in plans.
